items.summary: Playing despite heightened tensions back home, Iran is thrashed 3-0 by 2022 runners-up South Korea in the team's opening match of the tournament.

items.summary: Gun midfielder Jai Newcombe will challenge his one-match ban for rough conduct in a bid to play in Hawthorn's season opener against GWS.

items.title: Father 'prolonged suffering' of son by delaying medical help, court hears
